hero.headline: The electrician Pensacola *actually calls back*
hero.subheadline: No voicemails. No waiting days. When you call, we answer — and we show up when we say we will.

services_section.label: THE ELECTRICAL WORK
services_section.heading: Every wire, outlet, and panel
services_section.subheading: From hot tub hookups to full rewires — we handle it all

services.title: Panel Upgrades & Repairs
services.description: Old panels causing problems? We coordinate with Gulf Power, handle inspections, and get your electricity back on fast.

services.title: Outdoor & Specialty Wiring
services.description: Hot tubs, soffit lighting, outdoor outlets — we run the heavy-duty lines that need to be done right the first time.

services.title: Mobile Home Electrical
services.description: New mobile home setup? We handle the full electrical installation and coordinate with the power company for hookup.

services.title: Emergency Electrical Repairs
services.description: Power out? Dangerous wiring? We pick up the phone and often get there the next day — sometimes sooner.

about.heading: The electricians Pensacola trusts most
about.body: When your power's out or you need major electrical work, you want someone who answers the phone and shows up on time. That's exactly what we do. Whether it's a simple fix we can walk you through or a complex rewire requiring county inspection, we handle every detail so you don't have to worry about a thing.

reviews_section.label: WHAT FOLKS SAY
reviews_section.heading: Why neighbors keep our number handy

reviews.name: Mark M.
reviews.text: The only electrician I call. He answered every single time — never needed to leave a voicemail. Sometimes got help the very next day.

reviews.name: Amanda H.
reviews.text: Fast, courteous, and helpful with our mobile home electrical. Made sure Gulf Power handled everything on their end too.

reviews.name: Loretta F.
reviews.text: John coordinated everything — power off, repairs, county inspection, power back on. So pleased with how he handled it all.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving Pensacola and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Reliable electrical service throughout Northwest Florida

cta.heading: Need an electrician who actually answers?
cta.body: Call us now or request an estimate. We pick up the phone and show up when we say we will — that's just how we work.
